message:
Strengthen sync and replay_pack with edge-case tests and schema validation

Sync and replay pack module changes adding comprehensive edge-case
test coverage for JSONL processing and tolerance manifest handling:

sync.rs:
- Add optional_floats_equal zero and negative value tests covering
  0.0 vs 0.0, -1.5 vs -1.5, sign mismatch, and divergent negatives
- Add collect_jsonl_ids deduplication test verifying repeated IDs
  produce a single entry in the HashSet
- Add load_jsonl_run_map test for non-string IDs (integer, null) and
  missing ID fields being correctly skipped
- Add count_jsonl_lines blank/whitespace-only line skipping test
- Add count_jsonl_lines missing file returns zero test
- Add resolve_jsonl_path fallback behavior test when neither .jsonl
  nor .jsonl.gz exists (returns plain .jsonl variant)
- Add load_cursor wrong-schema JSON detection test (valid JSON but
  missing required fields triggers "invalid sync cursor" error)
- Add SyncLock release_inner double-call idempotency test verifying
  the released guard prevents redundant file operations
- Add collect_jsonl_ids empty file returns empty set test
- Add load_jsonl_run_map field preservation test verifying extra
  fields beyond "id" are retained in the returned map entries

replay_pack.rs:
- Add ToleranceManifest serde round-trip test validating all fields
  survive serialization and deserialization
- Add rollout_stage non-string value (integer 42) fallback-to-primary
  test covering the defensive parsing path
- Add tolerance_manifest counts match report test verifying
  segment_count and event_count reflect actual report contents
- Add require_speaker_exact default value (false) preservation test
- Add tolerance_manifest JSON key completeness test asserting exactly
  7 expected keys with no extras

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
